case_title: DOLORES SANCHEZ VS. NORMA MARTINEZ AYALA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $990.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, DOLORES AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, NORMA MARTINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DOLORES SANCHEZ. DEFENDANT NORMA MARTINEZ AYALA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, NORMA MARTINEZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED OCT-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, NORMA MARTINEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, DOLORES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYALA, NORMA MARTINEZ $990.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
